ddr5_train_vref_dq.description: Writes MR6 VREF_DQ_VAL. Returns 0-255 but spec limits to 0-127 (7-bit).

ddr5_train_vref_ca.description: Writes MR7 VREF_CA_VAL. Returns 0-255 but spec limits to 0-127 (7-bit).

ddr5_write_reg.description: Writes a mode register. tMRD timing must be observed after this call.
